form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (17.23) when eighth over 300m at this track in a Grade 5. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and four places from 11 starts. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, Last start finished sixth over 350m at this track, beaten 5 lengths. Others read better.
